---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement that isn't a new prompt or workflow (see the separate template for those)
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What's the gap or friction point?**

**What would you like to see instead?**

**Where in the repo would this live?**
(e.g. a new section in `docs/best-practices.md`, a change to `docs/workflow.md`)

**Would you be willing to submit a PR for this?**
